slots.label: Scout unit
slots.notes: Centered PNG on hex; PNG preferred over txt sprite fallback.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG for this slot (import bundle: pngBase64ByRelativePath key must be "scout.png"). Canvas: 128–256 px square, transparent background. Anchor visual weight to bottom_center of the hex footprint; silhouette readable at ~32 px on-screen; no baked shadows or text. Optional matching txtSprite "scout.txt" (ASCII #/X rows) only if PNG omitted.

slots.label: Settler unit
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "settler.png"). Same layout rules as other units: 128–256 px, transparent, bottom_center anchor, high contrast, no labels. Optional "settler.txt" sprite grid if no PNG.

slots.label: City (full hex)
slots.notes: Art is clipped to the hex; design for a pointy-top tile. Player tint is applied underneath.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "city.png"). Design for a pointy-top hex mask: important art inside the hex; edges may be clipped. 128–256 px class canvas, transparent outside crest; player color is drawn under this layer—leave room/treat edges for tint bleed. Optional "city.txt" fallback.

slots.label: Warrior unit
slots.notes: Centered on hex like scout/settler; falls back to glyph if files missing.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "warrior.png"). Unit-on-hex rules: 128–256 px, transparent, bottom_center, combat-readable silhouette, no text. Optional "warrior.txt".

slots.label: Farmer unit
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "farmer.png"). Same unit hex spec as scout; civilian readable iconography. Optional "farmer.txt".

slots.label: Builder unit
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "builder.png"). Same unit hex spec; suggest tools/gear readable at small size. Optional "builder.txt".

slots.label: Farm improvement
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "farm.png"). Tile improvement overlay: sits on grass/terrain; ~128 px class, transparent outside structure; avoid full-hex blocking shapes unless intentional. Optional "farm.txt".

slots.label: Mine improvement
slots.notes: Drawn on hill tiles with a mine; falls back to Mi glyph.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "mine.png"). Hill/mine overlay: compact, readable on muted terrain; transparent background; no text. Optional "mine.txt".

slots.label: Wildlife (map)
slots.notes: Shared token for all animals on the map; falls back to species glyph.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "wildlife.png"). Small map token (~96–128 px), transparent; simple silhouette works for all species; centered. Optional "wildlife.txt".

slots.label: Terrain: Water tile
slots.notes: Full-hex terrain texture layer for water tiles.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "terrain_water.png"). Full-hex texture style for water; seamless look is preferred; no text.

slots.label: Terrain: Grass tile
slots.notes: Full-hex terrain texture layer for grass tiles.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "terrain_grass.png"). Full-hex texture style for grassland; no text.

slots.label: Terrain: Plains tile
slots.notes: Full-hex terrain texture layer for plains tiles.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "terrain_plains.png"). Full-hex texture style for plains/steppe; no text.

slots.label: Terrain: Desert tile
slots.notes: Full-hex terrain texture layer for desert tiles.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "terrain_desert.png"). Full-hex texture style for sand/desert; no text.

slots.label: Terrain: Hill tile
slots.notes: Full-hex terrain texture layer for hill tiles.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "terrain_hill.png"). Full-hex texture style for rolling hills; no text.

slots.label: Terrain: Forest tile
slots.notes: Full-hex terrain texture layer for forest tiles.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "terrain_forest.png"). Full-hex texture style for forest canopy/floor; no text.

slots.label: Terrain: Mountain tile
slots.notes: Full-hex terrain texture layer for mountain tiles.
slots.imageReturnSpec: Return exactly one RGBA PNG (bundle key "terrain_mountain.png"). Full-hex texture style for mountains/rock; no text.
